attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WACV.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
WACV.EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,
WACV.EDW_CREATE_USER   ,
WACV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM    ,
WACV.EDW_UPDATE_USER   ,
WACV.END_TV_DTM	,
WACV.PD_ADJUSTMENT_DT  ,
WACV.PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD         ,
WACV.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  ,
WACV.PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD    ,
WACV.PD_BK_SALES_REP_NUM           ,
WACV.PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME   ,
WACV.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT       ,
WACV.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        ,
WACV.PD_SS_CD          ,
WACV.PD_TRANSACTION_DT ,
WACV.POS_SCAAC_KEY     ,
WACV.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT          ,
WACV.START_TV_DTM,
WACV.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD, 
WACV.PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,      
WACV.PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
WACV.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
WACV.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
WACV.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
WACV.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
WACV.UCRM_CASE_NUM,  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY17 AUG CDR*/    
WACV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
WACV.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID
FROM  $$WORKDB.W_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OVERLAY WACV
WHERE WACV.DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OVERLAY_TV NACV 
WHERE NACV.POS_SCAAC_KEY = WACV.POS_SCAAC_KEY)
